title: abrus pulchellus subsp. cantoniensis
intro: Abrus pulchellus subsp. cantoniensis, also known as the Cantones Abrus or Chinese Rosary Pea, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Abrus pulchellus subsp. cantoniensis can be found in traditional Chinese medicine, often in the form of decoctions or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
